### Psychological Warfare and Gangstalking
- Gangstalking: Organized harassment, surveillance, electronic harassment, noise harassment, poisoning, microchips
- Goal: Drive victims to despair, paranoia, isolation, ruin, suicide
- Music used as psychological weapon: Loud music for torture, subliminal messages, inducing hallucinations
